title: Inception
plot: Dom Cobb is a skilled thief, the absolute best in the dangerous art of extraction, stealing valuable secrets from deep within the subconscious during the dream state, when the mind is at its most vulnerable. Cobb's rare ability has made him a coveted player in this treacherous new world of corporate espionage, but it has also made him an international fugitive and cost him everything he has ever loved. Now Cobb is being offered a chance at redemption. One last job could give him his life back but only if he can accomplish the impossible, inception. Instead of the perfect heist, Cobb and his team of specialists have to pull off the reverse: their task is not to steal an idea, but to plant one. If they succeed, it could be the perfect crime. But no amount of careful planning or expertise can prepare the team for the dangerous enemy that seems to predict their every move. An enemy that only Cobb could have seen coming.
expanded_plot: Dom Cobb is not merely a thief; he is an unparalleled master of mental infiltration, renowned for his perilous art of extraction. He navigates the intricate architecture of the subconscious mind during the vulnerable dream state, meticulously stealing coveted secrets. This extraordinary, yet illicit, capability has made him an invaluable asset in the clandestine world of corporate espionage, a domain where information is the ultimate currency. However, this very talent has also rendered him an international fugitive, forcing him to abandon everything and everyone he cherishes, leaving a gaping void in his life. Now, a singular opportunity for absolution presents itself: a final, high-stakes assignment that promises to restore his lost life and reunite him with what he's been denied. This isn't a typical extraction; it's the reverse—inception. Instead of plundering an idea, Cobb and his hand-picked ensemble of specialists must orchestrate the impossible feat of planting one deep within a target's subconscious. Their success hinges on flawless execution, potentially making it the most audacious and perfect crime ever conceived. Yet, despite meticulous planning and an unmatched collective expertise, the team faces an insidious and unpredictable adversary within the dreamscape itself, an enemy whose very presence is deeply personal to Cobb and threatens to unravel the entire operation from within.

omdb_payload.Title: Inception
omdb_payload.Actors: Leonardo DiCaprio, Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Elliot Page
